concept.description: Creates a diagram about dependencies between packages containing Java types (per artifact, test artifacts are excluded -> 構文エラー出たので外した).
concept.cypher: MATCH (artifact:Main:Artifact)-[:CONTAINS]->(package:Package)-[:CONTAINS]->(:Type) OPTIONAL MATCH (package)-[dependsOn:DEPENDS_ON]->(:Package) RETURN { role : "graph", nodes : collect(package), relationships: collect(dependsOn) }
MATCH (p:Package)-[:CONTAINS]->(t:Type)-[:DECLARES]->(m:Member) WHERE NOT t:Inner OPTIONAL MATCH (t)-[e:EXTENDS|IMPLEMENTS]->(:Type) OPTIONAL MATCH (t)-[d:DEPENDS_ON]->(:Type) RETURN *
